category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Bahrain market (BSMD under MOIC, GSO standards adopting EN 149 FFP1/FFP2/FFP3, Ministry of Labour occupational framework, importer obligations).

title.en: China-to-Bahrain PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入巴林（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入巴林（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Bahrain market requirements: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) under the Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC), GSO Gulf standards adopting EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Labour occupational safety framework, and importer obligations. Medical masks fall under the national health regulator rather than the PPE route.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与巴林市场要求对照：工业与商业部（MOIC）下属的巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）、采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的海湾GSO标准、劳工部职业安全框架及进口商义务。医用口罩归属国家卫生监管机构而非PPE路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與巴林市場要求對照：工業與商業部（MOIC）下屬的巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）、採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的海灣GSO標準、勞工部職業安全框架及進口商義務。醫用口罩歸屬國家衛生監管機構而非PPE路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Bahrain law, BSMD/MOIC requirements, applicable GSO standards, and destination-market practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行巴林法律、BSMD/MOIC要求、适用的GSO标准及目的地市场实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行巴林法律、BSMD/MOIC要求、適用的GSO標準及目的地市場實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Bahrain follow the PPE route administered by the Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) under the Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC), with conformity demonstrated against GSO Gulf standards that adopt EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3). Occupational use is framed by the Ministry of Labour. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the EN 149-based GSO requirements. A registered Bahrain-based importer is the responsible party for conformity documentation and market access. Medical masks fall under the national health regulator, not the PPE route.
answer_first.zh: 进入巴林的FFP呼吸器遵循由工业与商业部（MOIC）下属的巴林标准与计量局（BSMD）管理的PPE路径，合规性须对照采纳EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的海湾GSO标准证明。职业使用由劳工部框架约束。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足基于EN 149的GSO要求。在巴林注册的进口商是合规文件与市场准入的责任方。医用口罩归属国家卫生监管机构，而非PPE路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入巴林的FFP呼吸器遵循由工業與商業部（MOIC）下屬的巴林標準與計量局（BSMD）管理的PPE路徑，合規性須對照採納EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的海灣GSO標準證明。職業使用由勞工部框架約束。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足基於EN 149的GSO要求。在巴林註冊的進口商是合規文件與市場准入的責任方。醫用口罩歸屬國家衛生監管機構，而非PPE路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag; last_verified is updated before human_reviewed can be true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred (BSMD/MOIC, GSO, Ministry of Labour). Local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
